prompt: Align built-in interfaces and CLI case handling
note: Set InLoopBack0 IFNET index to 0x0 and NULL0 to 0xffff, blocked interface view entry for InLoopBack0, made VVRP interface lookups case-insensitive with canonical names, and made command literal parsing globally case-insensitive. Also retained IP-owned 127.0.0.1/8 loopback route generation.

+

Add InLoopBack0 and IPv4 loopback direct routes

+

Added built-in VVRP InLoopBack0 IFNET interface, IP-owned 127.0.0.1/8 address state, and RM generation of both 127.0.0.0/8 and 127.0.0.1/32 Direct routes. FIB sync now carries loopback forwarding entries alongside Ethernet connected routes.
